_meta.description: Live grounded catalog — seed capabilities + pipeline-verified products.

capabilities.name: Flagship model
capabilities.description: Each provider's most capable general-purpose model.

capabilities.name: Consumer chat assistant
capabilities.description: Primary conversational app for end users across web, desktop, and mobile.

capabilities.name: Agentic coding
capabilities.description: Autonomous or assisted software development across terminal, IDE, and cloud surfaces.

capabilities.name: Remote / async agent control
capabilities.description: Starting, monitoring, and directing an agent (esp. a coding agent) from a remote device or asynchronously.

capabilities.name: Browser / computer-use agent
capabilities.description: An agent that drives a browser or computer on the user's behalf to complete multi-step web tasks.

capabilities.name: Knowledge-work / research agent
capabilities.description: Non-developer agent for documents, analysis, and research grounded in user sources.

capabilities.name: Agent-building SDK / framework
capabilities.description: Developer toolkit for building, orchestrating, and deploying custom agents.

capabilities.name: Enterprise agent platform / deployment
capabilities.description: Managed platform for building, deploying, governing, and running agents and models at enterprise scale.

capabilities.name: Image / video generation
capabilities.description: First-party models or products that generate images or video.

capabilities.name: Managed agent runtime
capabilities.description: Provider-hosted execution of agents: the provider runs the agent loop and sandboxes its tools, instead of you self-hosting.

capabilities.name: MCP & connectors
capabilities.description: Model Context Protocol support: hosted MCP servers, connector registries, and managed tool connectors.

capabilities.name: Agent memory
capabilities.description: Persistent, cross-session memory an agent can read and write across runs.

capabilities.name: Code execution & sandbox
capabilities.description: Server-side code execution in an isolated sandbox for agent actions.

capabilities.name: Agent evals & observability
capabilities.description: Tracing, evaluation, and monitoring of agent runs.

capabilities.name: Guardrails & safety
capabilities.description: Policy and safety controls on an agent's inputs, outputs, and actions.

capabilities.name: Subagents & orchestration
capabilities.description: Spawning and coordinating multiple agents / subagents within a single task.

capabilities.name: Unclassified (intake)
capabilities.description: Holding bucket for newly discovered offerings/features not yet mapped to a capability. The discovery pipeline lands items here as candidates; triage assigns the real capability.
